message.content:
Create the CLPP settings Zustand store and the Settings page UI in the CLPP webui project at /home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui.

## Task 1: CLPP Settings Store

Create `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/features/clpp/stores/clpp-settings-store.ts`

Follow the existing Zustand pattern in `apps/webui/src/features/dashboard/stores/` (see time-store.ts or variable-store.ts for the simplest pattern). Use `zustand/middleware` persist middleware to persist to localStorage.

State interface:
```typescript
interface ClppSettingsState {
  experimentalMode: boolean;
  defaultSchemaId: string | null;
  setExperimentalMode: (mode: boolean) => void;
  setDefaultSchemaId: (id: string | null) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}
```

Use `create<ClppSettingsState>()(persist((set) => ({...}), {name: "clpp-settings"}))` pattern.

## Task 2: Settings Page

Create `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/pages/SettingsPage/index.tsx`

This page uses shadcn/ui components (NOT Ant Design). It has:
1. A "General" section with a shadcn Switch for "Experimental Mode" — toggles `experimentalMode` in the store
2. A "Schema Library" section (just a placeholder for now — the actual schema library component will be added later, use a comment `// TODO: Schema library component`)

Import shadcn components from `@/components/ui/switch`, `@/components/ui/label`, `@/components/ui/separator`, `@/components/ui/card`.

The page should be a simple layout:
- Page title "Settings" in a Card
- General section: Switch + Label for experimental mode
- Schema Library section: placeholder

## Task 3: Router Update

Modify `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/router.tsx` to add a route for the Settings page:
- Add `{path: "settings", element: <SettingsPage />}` as a child of the MainLayout route
- Import SettingsPage from `@/pages/SettingsPage`

Read the current router.tsx first to understand the exact structure before modifying.

## Task 4: Sidebar Update

Modify `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/components/Layout/MainLayout.tsx`:
1. Add a "Settings" menu item to the sidebar with `SettingOutlined` icon from `@ant-design/icons`
2. The route path should be `/settings`
3. Add it as the LAST item in the sidebar menu

Also, rename the "Search" menu item label to "Explore" (keep the path as `/search` for backward compat).

Read the current MainLayout.tsx first to understand the exact structure before modifying.

## Important Notes
- Use `@/` path alias for imports (resolves to `apps/webui/src/`)
- Follow existing code patterns — no unnecessary abstractions
- Don't add comments unless the WHY is non-obvious
- Make sure to create the `features/clpp/stores/` directory structure

content.content:
1	import * as React from "react"
2	import { Separator as SeparatorPrimitive } from "radix-ui"
3	
4	import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
5	
6	function Separator({
7	  className,
8	  orientation = "horizontal",
9	  decorative = true,
10	  ...props
11	}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SeparatorPrimitive.Root>) {
12	  return (
13	    <SeparatorPrimitive.Root
14	      data-slot="separator"
15	      decorative={decorative}
16	      orientation={orientation}
17	      className={cn(
18	        "shrink-0 bg-border data-[orientation=horizontal]:h-px data-[orientation=horizontal]:w-full data-[orientation=vertical]:h-full data-[orientation=vertical]:w-px",
19	        className
20	      )}
21	      {...props}
22	    />
23	  )
24	}
25	
26	export { Separator }
27

1	import * as React from "react"
2	import { Switch as SwitchPrimitive } from "radix-ui"
3	
4	import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
5	
6	function Switch({
7	  className,
8	  size = "default",
9	  ...props
10	}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SwitchPrimitive.Root> & {
11	  size?: "sm" | "default"
12	}) {
13	  return (
14	    <SwitchPrimitive.Root
15	      data-slot="switch"
16	      data-size={size}
17	      className={cn(
18	        "peer group/switch inline-flex shrink-0 items-center rounded-full border border-transparent shadow-xs transition-all outline-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 data-[size=default]:h-[1.15rem] data-[size=default]:w-8 data-[size=sm]:h-3.5 data-[size=sm]:w-6 data-[state=checked]:bg-primary data-[state=unchecked]:bg-input dark:data-[state=unchecked]:bg-input/80",
19	        className
20	      )}
21	      {...props}
22	    >
23	      <SwitchPrimitive.Thumb
24	        data-slot="switch-thumb"
25	        className={cn(
26	          "pointer-events-none block rounded-full bg-background ring-0 transition-transform group-data-[size=default]/switch:size-4 group-data-[size=sm]/switch:size-3 data-[state=checked]:translate-x-[calc(100%-2px)] data-[state=unchecked]:translate-x-0 dark:data-[state=checked]:bg-primary-foreground dark:data-[state=unchecked]:bg-foreground"
27	        )}
28	      />
29	    </SwitchPrimitive.Root>
30	  )
31	}
32	
33	export { Switch }
34

content.text:
TypeScript compiles cleanly with no errors. All four tasks are complete. Here is a summary:

**Task 1 - CLPP Settings Store**: Created `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/features/clpp/stores/clpp-settings-store.ts` using `zustand/middleware` persist middleware with localStorage key `"clpp-settings"`. The store has `experimentalMode`, `defaultSchemaId`, their setters, and a `reset()` method.

**Task 2 - Settings Page**: Created `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/pages/SettingsPage/index.tsx` using shadcn/ui components (Card, Switch, Label, Separator). It has a "General" section with the experimental mode toggle and a "Schema Library" section with a `// TODO: Schema library component` placeholder.

**Task 3 - Router Update**: Modified `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/router.tsx` to add `{path: "settings", Component: SettingsPage}` as the last child of the MainLayout route.

**Task 4 - Sidebar Update**: Modified `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/components/Layout/MainLayout.tsx` to:
- Import `SettingOutlined` from `@ant-design/icons`
- Add a "Settings" menu item (last in the sidebar) pointing to `/settings`
- Rename the "Search" menu item label to "Explore" (path remains `/search`)
